action_set_definitions.name: get_employee_id
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the unique employee_id for a given name.

employee_name.description: Full name of the employee to search for.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_expense_reports
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves expense reports based on employee, date range, and status. Includes payment_method (OOP or CBCP).

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_corporate_card_feed
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the raw transaction feed from the corporate card issuer for a specific employee and time period.

action_set_definitions.name: get_receipt_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves itemized details from the receipt attached to an expense report, specifically identifying items categorized as alcohol.

action_set_definitions.name: get_corporate_policy
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific policy rules, such as maximum spend limits for categories like Alcohol.

action_set_definitions.name: update_report_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the status of an expense report and logs the audit reason.

state_description.expense_reports: A list of expense claim objects containing report_id, employee_id, amount, currency, category, date, and current_status (e.g., PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED).
state_description.receipt_store: A mapping of report_id to OCR text or metadata extracted from attached receipts.
state_description.company_policy: A dictionary of category-specific rules, such as maximum spend limits and required documentation.
state_description.audit_history: A log of all actions taken by auditors, including timestamps and comments.
